title: crate-sieve-form-2r1
description: The 'not' test is implemented at evaluator.rs:230 but has zero test coverage in either src/lib.rs or tests/rfc_vectors.rs. RFC 5228 §5.3 defines 'not' as a test that inverts the result of another test. A regression in eval_test dispatch for 'not' would go undetected. Add an integration test: not with a simple test that would otherwise match, verify Keep is returned instead.
